description: The Legacy Trails Ribbon Adapter component is used to convert legacy content from the old particle system driven by Unity to Photon Dust.

fields.TrailsMode: The enum used to control the conversion from legacy trails to Photon Dust.
fields.ParticleSizeAffectsTrailWidth: Whether the particle size should affect the trail width.
fields.InheritTrailColorFromParticle: Whether the trail should inherit color from the particle it is following.
fields.TrailWorldSpace: Whether the trail is in world or local space.
fields.TrailsModule: The enabled field on a trails module to drive.
fields.RibbonModule: The enabled field on a ribbons module to drive.
fields.RibbonUseParticleSize: The use particle size field to drive on a ribbons module.
fields.RibbonUseParticleColor: The use particle color field to drive on a ribbons module.
fields.TrailSizeInheritance: The use particle size field to drive on a trails module.
fields.TrailColorInheritance: The use particle color field to drive on a trails module.
fields.TrailsSpace: The trails space field to drive on a trails module.

usage: Used in legacy content. do not use in new content.
